prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid billet wheel) for the **CTWA 3.0L V6 TFSI** engine, paired with a **Forge Motorsport** silicone intake system and **034 Motorsport** high-flow intercooler (Q5 SQ5-specific core, 12-row design) to support 550+ HP on **E85 fuel** with a **Dorch Engineering** Stage 2+ ECU tune (custom calibration for 22 PSI boost)

Install **AP Racing** 6-piston front (380mm) and 4-piston rear (356mm) big brake kit with **Ferodo DS2500** pads, paired with **H&R** lowering springs (25mm front, 20mm rear) and **Bilstein B16 PSS10** coilovers (adjustable damping, 10-click rebound/compression) for optimized weight transfer and cornering stability

Replace the stock **DL501 7-speed S tronic** transmission with a **0B5 8-speed ZF 8HP** (from the RS Q8) using an **iABED Industries** adapter kit, paired with a **South Bend Clutch** Stage 3 twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic, 800 Nm torque capacity) and **Falken Azenis FK510** 285/35R21 tires for improved power delivery and traction
estetica: **Rocket Bunny** widebody kit (Q5 SQ5-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended flares) paired with a **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber front lip and rear diffuser, finished in **Audi Nardo Grey** with **3M Matte Black** roof wrap

**HRE** FF03 21x10.5 ET35 (front) and 21x11.5 ET40 (rear) forged wheels in **Gunmetal Bronze**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (285/30R21 front, 305/25R21 rear) for aggressive stance and track-ready grip

**Akrapović** Evolution titanium exhaust system (dual 100mm tips, Q5 SQ5-specific valvetronic bypass) with **Vorschlag** carbon fiber exhaust tips, paired with a **Maxton Design** rear spoiler (carbon fiber, 30mm adjustable angle) and **Litchfield** carbon fiber engine cover (CTWA-specific cutouts)
